name: Progress Metrics Dashboard
description: Per-learner dashboard showing all tracked metrics. Delivered via !progress command and included in weekly/monthly reports.

consistency.current_streak: Days with at least 1 task completed
consistency.days_active: Total days with activity since joining

community.peer_feedback_given: Times they provided feedback to others

advancement.estimated_weeks_remaining: AI estimate of time to advancement

display_format_discord.anonymous_comparison: Compared to others at your level: top {PERCENTILE}% in {STRONGEST_DIMENSION}.

visualization_future.web_dashboard: Phase 3+ — dedicated web page with charts, radar, trend lines
